revision.comment: per edit request on talk page - add redir1 parameter
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = South Vietnam | flag alias = Flag of South Vietnam.svg | flag alias-1975 = FNL Flag.svg | flag alias-war = War flag of South Vietnam.svg | flag alias-air force = Flag of the Republic of Vietnam Air Force.svg | flag alias-army = Flag of the Army of the Republic of Vietnam.svg | flag alias-naval = Naval ensign of South Vietnam.svg | link alias-air force = Republic of Vietnam Air Force | link alias-army = Army of the Republic of Vietnam | link alias-naval = Republic of Vietnam Navy | flag alias-military = Flag of the RVNMF.svg | link alias-military = Republic of Vietnam Military Forces | flag alias-navy = Flag of the Republic of Vietnam Navy.svg | link alias-navy = Republic of Vietnam Navy | flag alias-marines = Flag of the Republic of Vietnam Marine Division.svg | link alias-marines = Republic of Vietnam Marine Division | link alias-tennis = Vietnam {{{mw}}} Cup team | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1975 | var2 = war | redir1 = Republic of Vietnam | related1 = Vietnam </noinclude> }}

{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = South Vietnam | flag alias = Flag of South Vietnam.svg | flag alias-1975 = FNL Flag.svg | flag alias-war = War flag of South Vietnam.svg | flag alias-air force = Flag of the Republic of Vietnam Air Force.svg | flag alias-army = Flag of the Army of the Republic of Vietnam.svg | flag alias-naval = Naval ensign of South Vietnam.svg | link alias-air force = Republic of Vietnam Air Force | link alias-army = Army of the Republic of Vietnam | link alias-naval = Republic of Vietnam Navy | flag alias-military = Flag of the RVNMF.svg | link alias-military = Republic of Vietnam Military Forces | flag alias-navy = Flag of the Republic of Vietnam Navy.svg | link alias-navy = Republic of Vietnam Navy | flag alias-marines = Flag of the Republic of Vietnam Marine Division.svg | link alias-marines = Republic of Vietnam Marine Division | link alias-tennis = Vietnam {{{mw}}} Cup team | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1975 | var2 = war | redir1 = Republic of Vietnam | related1 = Vietnam </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = South Vietnam | flag alias = Flag of South Vietnam.svg | flag alias-1975 = FNL Flag.svg | flag alias-war = War flag of South Vietnam.svg | flag alias-air force = Flag of the Republic of Vietnam Air Force.svg | flag alias-army = Flag of the Army of the Republic of Vietnam.svg | flag alias-naval = Naval ensign of South Vietnam.svg | link alias-air force = Republic of Vietnam Air Force | link alias-army = Army of the Republic of Vietnam | link alias-naval = Republic of Vietnam Navy | flag alias-military = Flag of the RVNMF.svg | link alias-military = Republic of Vietnam Military Forces | flag alias-navy = Flag of the Republic of Vietnam Navy.svg | link alias-navy = Republic of Vietnam Navy | flag alias-marines = Flag of the Republic of Vietnam Marine Division.svg | link alias-marines = Republic of Vietnam Marine Division | link alias-tennis = Vietnam {{{mw}}} Cup team | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1975 | var2 = war | redir1 = Republic of Vietnam | related1 = Vietnam </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = South Vietnam | flag alias = Flag of South Vietnam.svg | flag alias-1975 = FNL Flag.svg | flag alias-war = War flag of South Vietnam.svg | flag alias-air force = Flag of the Republic of Vietnam Air Force.svg | flag alias-army = Flag of the Army of the Republic of Vietnam.svg | flag alias-naval = Naval ensign of South Vietnam.svg | link alias-air force = Republic of Vietnam Air Force | link alias-army = Army of the Republic of Vietnam | link alias-naval = Republic of Vietnam Navy | flag alias-military = Flag of the RVNMF.svg | link alias-military = Republic of Vietnam Military Forces | flag alias-navy = Flag of the Republic of Vietnam Navy.svg | link alias-navy = Republic of Vietnam Navy | flag alias-marines = Flag of the Republic of Vietnam Marine Division.svg | link alias-marines = Republic of Vietnam Marine Division | link alias-tennis = Vietnam {{{mw}}} Cup team | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1975 | var2 = war | redir1 = Republic of Vietnam | related1 = Vietnam </noinclude> }} <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = South Vietnam | flag alias = Flag of South Vietnam.svg | flag alias-1975 = FNL Flag.svg | flag alias-war = War flag of South Vietnam.svg | flag alias-air force = Flag of the Republic of Vietnam Air Force.svg | flag alias-army = Flag of the Army of the Republic of Vietnam.svg | flag alias-naval = Naval ensign of South Vietnam.svg | link alias-air force = Republic of Vietnam Air Force | link alias-army = Army of the Republic of Vietnam | link alias-naval = Republic of Vietnam Navy | flag alias-military = Flag of the RVNMF.svg | link alias-military = Republic of Vietnam Military Forces | flag alias-navy = Flag of the Republic of Vietnam Navy.svg | link alias-navy = Republic of Vietnam Navy | flag alias-marines = Flag of the Republic of Vietnam Marine Division.svg | link alias-marines = Republic of Vietnam Marine Division | link alias-tennis = Vietnam {{{mw}}} Cup team | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1975 | var2 = war | redir1 = Republic of Vietnam | related1 = Vietnam </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_South_Vietnam here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_South_Vietnam for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = South Vietnam | flag alias = Flag of South Vietnam.svg | flag alias-1975 = FNL Flag.svg | flag alias-war = War flag of South Vietnam.svg | flag alias-air force = Flag of the Republic of Vietnam Air Force.svg | flag alias-army = Flag of the Army of the Republic of Vietnam.svg | flag alias-naval = Naval ensign of South Vietnam.svg | link alias-air force = Republic of Vietnam Air Force | link alias-army = Army of the Republic of Vietnam | link alias-naval = Republic of Vietnam Navy | flag alias-military = Flag of the RVNMF.svg | link alias-military = Republic of Vietnam Military Forces | flag alias-navy = Flag of the Republic of Vietnam Navy.svg | link alias-navy = Republic of Vietnam Navy | flag alias-marines = Flag of the Republic of Vietnam Marine Division.svg | link alias-marines = Republic of Vietnam Marine Division | link alias-tennis = Vietnam {{{mw}}} Cup team | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1975 | var2 = war | redir1 = Republic of Vietnam | related1 = Vietnam </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
